title: Ulcerative colitis relief for caucasians through 11 herbal essential oils
description: Achillea millefolium essential oils, also known as Yarrow, may help alleviate symptoms of ulcerative colitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The oil contains constituents like borneol, bornyl acetate, and sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial overgrowth in the gut. This can be beneficial in ulcerative colitis, a condition characterized by chronic inflammation and ulceration of the colon.  To use Achillea millefolium...
